title: Crucible Services Schema
description: This schema defines the Crucible services configuration file

image-sourcing.description: The image-sourcing object contains configuration settings for the container image sourcing service(s). Multiple services can be configured, one per CPU architecture, to support multi-architecture image builds.

use.description: This parameter controls whether the image sourcing service is used

services.description: A map of CPU architecture to image sourcing service configuration. Each key is an architecture name (e.g., 'x86_64', 'aarch64') or the special value 'default' which is resolved to the host's native architecture during install/update. Services with 'start' set to true are started locally; non-native architectures are started under QEMU emulation.

^(default|x86_64|aarch64|ppc64le|s390x)$.description: Configuration for an image sourcing service that builds images for this architecture

start.description: This parameter controls whether this image sourcing service should be started locally. Only services matching the host's native architecture can be started locally; non-native architectures must use a remote service with start set to false.

location.description: The location object contains configuration settings to locate where the image sourcing service can be accessed

address.description: This parameter contains the hostname or IP address that is used to access the image sourcing service

port.description: This parameter contains the network port where the image sourcing service is running

protocol.description: This parameter contains the protocol that is used to communicate with the image sourcing service

cdm-server.description: The cdm-server object contains configuration settings for the CDM query server

port.description: This parameter contains the network port where the CDM query server listens

httpd.description: The httpd object contains configuration settings for the Apache HTTP server

port.description: This parameter contains the network port where the HTTP server listens

valkey.description: The valkey object contains configuration settings for the valkey service

monitor.description: The monitor object contains configuration settings for valkey monitor service

enabled.description: This parameter controls whether or not the valkey monitor service is enabled

opensearch.description: The opensearch object contains configuration for OpenSearch instances used for indexing and querying benchmark results. This replaces the former config/instances.json file.

instances.description: A list of OpenSearch instance definitions. Each instance specifies a host, CDM version, and optional authentication credentials.

name.description: A unique name identifying this OpenSearch instance

host.description: The hostname and port of the OpenSearch instance (e.g., 'localhost:9200')

cdmver.description: The Common Data Model version used by this instance (e.g., 'v8dev', 'v9dev')

userpass.description: Optional user:password credentials for authenticating with this OpenSearch instance

index-to.description: The name of the default instance used for indexing new benchmark results. Set to null if no default is configured.

query-from.description: A list of instance names that are available for querying results
